description: A contiguous growable array type. Python equivalent: list.

methods.name: push
methods.description: Appends an element to the back.

methods.name: pop
methods.description: Removes the last element and returns it.
methods.example:
let mut v = vec![1, 2];
let last = v.pop(); // Some(2)

methods.name: iter
methods.description: Returns an iterator over the slice.

methods.name: contains
methods.description: Returns true if the slice contains the value.

methods.name: sort
methods.description: Sorts the slice in ascending order.
